analysisSummary: The fallback path is a deterministic TempDir location and the writers in config/telemetry/workflow all route security-relevant state beneath it. There is no per-user suffix or permission tightening in the vulnerable version, so local cross-user reads and overwrites are reachable whenever HOME/XDG is unwritable.

The persistent telemetry paths also used a deterministic TempDir fallback and append JSONL data there without any user scoping. When HOME/XDG_DATA_HOME fails, routing/review telemetry is written to a shared directory that other local users can inspect or poison.
